app.title: Fence Cost Calculator
app.subtitle: Estimate the cost of your fence project

start.heading: Welcome
start.description: This tool helps you estimate the cost of your brick fencing project. Configure your fence step by step and get an instant quote.

dimensions.heading: Wall Dimensions
dimensions.description: Enter the overall length and height of your fence.

bond.heading: Bond Pattern
bond.description: Choose a brick bond pattern for your fence.
bond.stretcherDesc: Most common pattern. Bricks staggered by half in each row.
bond.stackDesc: Bricks stacked directly on top of each other. Simple and strong.
bond.headerDesc: All headers laid lengthwise. Strong and uniform appearance.
bond.englishDesc: Alternating courses of stretchers and headers. Very strong.
bond.flemishGardenDesc: Shifted headers and stretchers in a garden wall layout.

diagram.awaitingDimensions: Enter wall dimensions to see a preview.

cost.heading: Cost Estimate
cost.description: Here is your estimated fence cost breakdown.
cost.disclaimer: This is an estimate only. Actual costs may vary based on materials, labor, and site conditions.

quotes.title: My Saved Quotes
quotes.empty: No saved quotes yet. Create a cost estimate and save it!
quotes.willOverwrite: A quote with this name already exists and will be overwritten.
quotes.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this quote?

cookie.message: This site uses cookies and local storage to save your preferences and project data.
